ja: よくある英語の間違い
vi: Nhung loi tieng Anh thuong gap

en: I met him three years before
ko: I met him three years before (틀린 표현)
ja: I met him three years before（間違い）
zhTW: I met him three years before（錯誤用法）
vi: I met him three years before (sai)

ja: 正しい表現

en: I met him three years ago
ko: I met him three years ago
ja: 3年前に彼に会った。
vi: Toi gap anh ay ba nam truoc.

ja: 違いは何？
正しい表現
違いは何？

en: Could you please give me an information?
ko: Could you please give me an information? (틀린 표현)
ja: Could you please give me an information?（間違い）
zhTW: Could you please give me an information?（錯誤用法）
vi: Could you please give me an information? (sai)

ja: 正しい表現

en: Could you please give me some information?
ko: Could you please give me some information?
ja: 何か情報をいただけますか？
zhTW: 你可以給我一些資訊嗎？
vi: Ban co the cho toi mot so thong tin duoc khong?

en: Today morning I had a meeting with my buyer

zhTW: Today morning I had a meeting with my buyer（錯誤用法）
vi: Today morning I had a meeting with my buyer (sai)

ko: This morning I had a meeting with my buyer
ja: 今朝、バイヤーとの会議があった。
zhTW: 今天早上我跟買家開了個會。
vi: Sang nay toi da hop voi nguoi mua.

ko: This is a three-month course (틀린 표현)

vi: Day la khoa hoc ba thang.
